title: How to Cheat in the Leaving Certificate
original_title: How to Cheat in the Leaving Certificate
overview: "How to cheat the Leaving Certificate?" : a question posed by thousands of students every year in Ireland. A group of pupils set up an elaborate master-plan to beat the system and top the points race.
